gate.title: Made for the big screen
gate.description: Reverie's cockpit — the effects, the living waveform and the mood — needs room to breathe. Open it on a computer to enjoy the full experience.

app.subtitle: Dreamy edits for your favorite tracks
app.description: Transform your music with audio effects. Speed up, slow down, add reverb, or create immersive 8D audio versions of your tracks with exports that match your original format and quality.

meta.title: Reverie - Slowed + Reverb, 8D & Speed | Free Online Audio Editor
meta.description: Free online audio editor - Transform your music with audio effects instantly in your browser. Create sped up versions, slow + reverb remixes, immersive 8D audio, or bass boosted tracks. No download required. 100% free online tool with client-side processing.
meta.keywords: online audio editor, audio manipulation online, speed up audio online, slow reverb online, 8D audio online, bass boost online, online audio effects, online music editor, free audio tool online, browser audio editor, no download audio editor, bass booster online
